phrases.intent_en: Ask how long the San Luca portico walk takes
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quanto tempo ci vuole per fare il portico di San Luca?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAN-toh TEM-poh chee VWOH-leh per FAH-reh eel por-TEE-koh dee san LOO-kah?
phrases.cultural_note: The San Luca portico has 666 arches and climbs 3.5 km to the basilica — allow 45–60 minutes each way.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the portico walk starts
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, da dove inizia il percorso dei portici?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, dah DOH-veh ee-NEET-syah eel per-KOR-soh day por-TEE-chee?

responses.english: From Porta Saragozza, ten minutes on foot.
responses.phonetic: dah POR-tah sah-rah-GOT-tsah, ah DYEH-chee mee-NOO-tee ah PYEH-dee.
responses.local: Da Porta Saragozza, a dieci minuti a piedi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the porticoes are wheelchair accessible
phrases.text_local: Scusi, i portici sono accessibili in carrozzina?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ee por-TEE-chee SOH-noh aht-ches-SEE-bee-lee een kar-rot-TSEE-nah?

responses.english: The city center ones yes, San Luca no.
responses.phonetic: ee por-TEE-chee del CHEN-troh see, san LOO-kah no.
responses.local: I portici del centro sì, San Luca no.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what the porticoes are used for today
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a cosa servono i portici oggi?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah KOH-zah SER-voh-noh ee por-TEE-chee OJ-jee?
phrases.cultural_note: The porticoes have sheltered Bolognesi from rain for centuries and still function as everyday covered walkways.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the most photogenic portico section is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, qual è il tratto più fotografico dei portici?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, kwahl eh eel TRAT-toh PYOO foh-toh-GRAH-fee-koh day por-TEE-chee?

responses.english: The first stretch of San Luca, at sunset.
responses.phonetic: eel PREE-moh TRAT-toh dee san LOO-kah, al trah-MON-toh.
responses.local: Il primo tratto di San Luca, al tramonto.
